creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
submitter forgot to cc bug-followup

-------- Original Message --------
Subject: 	Re: ports/169380: security/sshguard: no startup script for 
sshguard
Date: 	Mon, 9 Jul 2012 11:46:47 -0400
From: 	Garrett Wollman <wollman@csail.mit.edu>
To: 	Michael Scheidell <scheidell@freebsd.org>



<<On Mon, 9 Jul 2012 11:43:19 -0400, Michael Scheidell<scheidell@freebsd.org>  said:

>  I am not 'the ports person'. I just commit already written code.
>  If the code you wrote works for you  locally, then fine, but is it not
>  in a format that can be committed to the ports tree.

>  if you want someone to write the code for you, you need to contact the
>  maintainer, and or email freebsd-ports@ mailing list.

There is no code to be written (I have supplied that), only ports
makefile glue.  I opened a PR so that somebody with the relevant
expertise could add a startup script to the port.  Evidently you're
not interested in doing that.  I can see that further communication
with you is a complete waste of time.

-GAWollman
